entity.label: Gedor
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town apparently in Benjamin (1 Chr. 12:7), the same probably as Geder (Josh. 12:13).

nodes.label: Gedor
nodes.description: A town apparently in Benjamin (1 Chr. 12:7), the same probably as Geder (Josh. 12:13).

verses.text: And Joelah, and Zebadiah, the sons of Jeroham of Gedor.
